response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience with a focus on testability and user experience, but lacks the depth of C++ and large-scale cloud compute infrastructure experience required for this role. His leadership and mentoring skills are evident, but the role's core technical requirements are not fully met.
strengths: Proven leadership and mentoring experience through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
Diverse technical background with exposure to distributed systems, real-time data processing, and DevOps practices.
Strong problem-solving skills and a track record of driving projects to completion in ambiguous environments.
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience (only ~2 years at National Instruments, far below the 8-year requirement).
Limited direct experience with large-scale cloud compute platforms or production-level cloud architecture.
Primary expertise lies in full-stack and web technologies, which are not core to this role.
